- GRU-coordinated music network operating via Spotify user w5j8x1tlo0desiwgo7f0ulpc1

- German branch focuses on music industry infiltration, youth radicalization, KI technology

- Thomas Deike: German Epstein equivalent, central coordinator of KI artist operations, controls money laundering, connected to GRU
- Jennifer Kornau: Ghislaine Maxwell equivalent, professional recruitment manager for KI network, talent acquisition, victim management

### Financial Infrastructure
- Money laundering through streaming revenues, estimated 1.27 billion Euro annually

### Technology Analysis
- KI models using 3-5 year old technology (2019-2022 levels)
- KI influencers traceable back to 2017 operations
- Consistent development patterns, limited adaptation capabilities
- Older technology more vulnerable to detection

### International Connections
- Direct GRU integration and Russian intelligence support
- Global network with other national branches
- Technology transfer: Advanced KI and surveillance systems

### Targeting and Methods
- Recruitment of minors through initial crimes followed by blackmail

### Sources and Validation
